purpose: Replace the procedural portal material atlas source with generated source art for wallpaper, carpet, ceiling tile, and trim/baseboard materials.

source_families.role: aged yellow Backrooms wallpaper with stains, seams, and fluorescent bleaching
damp low-pile brown-yellow office carpet with worn tile seams
stained acoustic drop-ceiling tile with grid channels and water rings
aged dark tan trim/baseboard material with scratches and grime

candidate_policy.rejected_notes: Accepted first built-in imagegen sheet because it has no text/logos, separates the four material families cleanly, and materially improves surface detail over the procedural atlas.

notes: This is a runtime slice source sheet, not a complete PBR material pack. It raises material fidelity while T0011 render-target lighting remains unresolved.
